trans-unit.source: Already connected to AppHost backchannel.
trans-unit.target: Ya está conectado al canal de retroalimentación de AppHost.

trans-unit.source: App host exited unexpectedly.
trans-unit.target: App host exited unexpectedly.

trans-unit.source: AppHost is incompatible with the CLI. The AppHost must be updated to a version that supports the {0} capability.
trans-unit.target: AppHost no es compatible con la CLI. Debe actualizarse a una versión que soporte la funcionalidad {0}.

trans-unit.source: AppHost file was specified in '{0}' but it does not exist at '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: El archivo AppHost se especificó en '{0}' pero no existe en '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: No buildable app hosts were found, but there may have been unbuildable app hosts.
trans-unit.target: No se detectaron hosts de aplicación válidos para compilación, aunque podrían existir algunos que no son válidos para compilación.

trans-unit.source: AspireHostingVersion is null
trans-unit.target: AspireHostingVersion es null

trans-unit.source: The Aspire.Hosting package version {0} is not supported. Please update to the latest version.
trans-unit.target: No se admite la versión {0} del paquete Aspire.Hosting. Actualización automática a la última versión.

trans-unit.source: Bundle is already extracted and up to date. Use --force to re-extract.
trans-unit.target: Bundle is already extracted and up to date. Use --force to re-extract.

trans-unit.source: Bundle extracted to {0}
trans-unit.target: Bundle extracted to {0}

trans-unit.source: Bundle was extracted to {0} but layout validation failed.
trans-unit.target: Bundle was extracted to {0} but layout validation failed.

trans-unit.source: Cannot use --watch and --no-build at the same time.
trans-unit.target: No se puede usar --watch y --no-build al mismo tiempo.

trans-unit.source: Developer certificates may not be fully trusted (trust exit code was: {0}).
trans-unit.target: Es posible que los certificados de desarrollador no sean de plena confianza (el código de salida de confianza era: {0}).

trans-unit.source: This command is not yet supported with single file AppHosts.
trans-unit.target: Este comando aún no es compatible con AppHosts de un solo archivo.

trans-unit.source: Configuration key {0} not found.
trans-unit.target: No se encuentra la clave de configuración {0}.

trans-unit.source: Configuration key is required.
trans-unit.target: Se requiere una clave de configuración.

trans-unit.source: Configuration value is required.
trans-unit.target: El valor de configuración es obligatorio.

trans-unit.source: Could not determine the CLI executable path.
trans-unit.target: Could not determine the CLI executable path.

trans-unit.source: Could not determine the installation path.
trans-unit.target: Could not determine the installation path.

trans-unit.source: Could not parse Aspire.Hosting package version.
trans-unit.target: No se pudo analizar la versión del paquete Aspire.Hosting.

trans-unit.source: Error deleting configuration: {0}
trans-unit.target: Error al eliminar la configuración: {0}

trans-unit.source: Error setting configuration: {0}
trans-unit.target: Error al establecer la configuración: {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected a .csproj file, got: {0}
trans-unit.target: Expected a .csproj file, got: {0}

trans-unit.source: Aspire Extension is incompatible with the CLI. The Extension must be updated to a version that supports the {0} capability.
trans-unit.target: Aspire Extension no es compatible con la CLI. Debe actualizarse a una versión que soporte la funcionalidad de {0}.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire extension token must be set if ASPIRE_EXTENSION_ENDPOINT is set. Please ensure that ASPIRE_EXTENSION_TOKEN is set
trans-unit.target: Si se establece ASPIRE_EXTENSION_ENDPOINT, se debe configurar el token de extensión de Aspire. Asegúrese de que ASPIRE_EXTENSION_TOKEN esté configurado
trans-unit.note: Do not localize ASPIRE_EXTENSION_TOKEN and ASPIRE_EXTENSION_ENDPOINT

trans-unit.source: Failed to build AppHost server.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build AppHost server.

trans-unit.source: Failed to build capability scanner.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build capability scanner.

trans-unit.source: Failed to build SDK generation server.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build SDK generation server.

trans-unit.source: Failed to install {0} dependencies.
trans-unit.target: Failed to install {0} dependencies.

trans-unit.source: Failed to parse template version from stdout.
trans-unit.target: No se pudo analizar la versión de la plantilla desde stdout.

trans-unit.source: Failed to prepare AppHost server.
trans-unit.target: Failed to prepare AppHost server.

trans-unit.source: Failed to publish {0} AppHost: {1}
trans-unit.target: Failed to publish {0} AppHost: {1}

trans-unit.source: Failed to retrieve template packages via cache.
trans-unit.target: No se pudieron recuperar los paquetes de plantillas a través de la caché.

trans-unit.source: Failed to run {0} AppHost: {1}
trans-unit.target: Failed to run {0} AppHost: {1}

trans-unit.source: Failed to search for packages. Exit code: {0}.
trans-unit.target: No se pudieron buscar paquetes. Código de salida: {0}.

trans-unit.source: Generated {0} files in {1}
trans-unit.target: Generated {0} files in {1}

trans-unit.source: GuestRuntime not initialized.
trans-unit.target: GuestRuntime not initialized.

trans-unit.source: GuestRuntime not initialized. This is a bug.
trans-unit.target: GuestRuntime not initialized. This is a bug.

trans-unit.source: Integration project not found: {0}
trans-unit.target: Integration project not found: {0}

trans-unit.source: Invalid integration argument '{0}'. Expected a .csproj path or PackageName@Version format.
trans-unit.target: Invalid integration argument '{0}'. Expected a .csproj path or PackageName@Version format.

trans-unit.source: Invalid locale {0} provided will not be used.
trans-unit.target: No se usará la configuración regional no válida {0} proporcionada.

trans-unit.source: Invalid package format '{0}'. Expected PackageName@Version (e.g. Aspire.Hosting.Redis@9.2.0).
trans-unit.target: Invalid package format '{0}'. Expected PackageName@Version (e.g. Aspire.Hosting.Redis@9.2.0).

trans-unit.source: The provided extension socket path needs two valid parts.
trans-unit.target: La ruta de acceso del socket de extensión proporcionada necesita dos partes válidas.

trans-unit.source: Invalid version '{0}' in '{1}'. Expected a valid NuGet version (e.g. 9.2.0).
trans-unit.target: Invalid version '{0}' in '{1}'. Expected a valid NuGet version (e.g. 9.2.0).

trans-unit.source: The Aspire CLI requires .NET SDK version {0} or later. Detected: {1}.
trans-unit.target: La CLI de Aspire requiere la versión {0} del SDK de .NET o posterior. Detectado: {1}.

trans-unit.source: Multiple project files found.
trans-unit.target: Se encontraron varios archivos de proyecto.

trans-unit.source: This CLI binary does not contain an embedded bundle. No extraction needed.
trans-unit.target: This CLI binary does not contain an embedded bundle. No extraction needed.

trans-unit.source: No project file found.
trans-unit.target: No se encontró ningún archivo de proyecto.

trans-unit.source: Input was required for prompt '{0}' but not provided.
trans-unit.target: Se requiere una entrada para la solicitud '{0}', pero no se ha proporcionado.

trans-unit.source: The project could not be analyzed due to a build error. See logs at {0}
trans-unit.target: The project could not be analyzed due to a build error. See logs at {0}

trans-unit.source: Project file does not exist.
trans-unit.target: El archivo de proyecto no existe.

trans-unit.source: Could not build: {0}
trans-unit.target: No se pudo compilar: {0}

trans-unit.source: Project file is not an Aspire AppHost project.
trans-unit.target: El archivo del proyecto no es un proyecto AppHost de Aspire.

trans-unit.source: The project does not contain an Aspire apphost.
trans-unit.target: El proyecto no contiene ningún apphost de Aspire.

trans-unit.source: Unable to retrieve the assembly version.
trans-unit.target: No se puede recuperar la versión del ensamblado.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported language: {0}
trans-unit.target: Unsupported language: {0}

trans-unit.source: Unsupported locale {0} provided will not be used. Supported locales are: {1}.
trans-unit.target: No se usarán las configuraciones regionales no admitidas {0} proporcionadas. Las configuraciones regionales admitidas son: {1}.
trans-unit.note: {1} is a comma-separated list of locales.
